title: Electronics (smartphones & tablets)
notes: In force for smartphones & tablets since 2025-06-20 (repairability class A-E, durability, 7-year spare parts, OS updates). Broader consumer-electronics DPP delegated act anticipated ~2027 — schema will extend then. v1.1.0 (current) corrects repairabilityScore to the structured {overall, criteria} shape; v1.0.0 is kept for historical immutability (it incorrectly declared repairabilityScore as a bare number).
